urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Air quality plummets in 20 US states as smoke from Canadian wildfires spreads
latest.summary: Air quality alerts have been issued in over 20 US states due to smoke from Canadian wildfires. The smoke has made Chicago's air quality the worst in the world, followed by Detroit and Minneapolis.
latest.details: Air quality alerts have been issued in over 20 US states due to smoke from Canadian wildfires. The smoke has made Chicago's air quality the worst in the world, followed by Detroit and Minneapolis. Local officials in New York City have urged residents to limit outdoor activities, especially vulnerable populations. NASA reported that winds have carried smoke primarily southeast, affecting large areas of the US.
latest.full_brief: Air quality alerts have been issued in over 20 US states due to smoke from Canadian wildfires. The smoke has made Chicago's air quality the worst in the world, followed by Detroit and Minneapolis. Local officials in New York City have urged residents to limit outdoor activities, especially vulnerable populations. NASA reported that winds have carried smoke primarily southeast, affecting large areas of the US.

latest.title: I thought we'd grow old together, says band leader whose girlfriend died in Thai bar inferno
latest.summary: A fire at a bar in Bangkok resulted in the deaths of 33 people, including four members of the band Thotsakan. Band leader Athipat Wichan expressed his grief and regret over the loss of his girlfriend, who was among the deceased.
latest.details: A fire at a bar in Bangkok resulted in the deaths of 33 people, including four members of the band Thotsakan. Band leader Athipat Wichan expressed his grief and regret over the loss of his girlfriend, who was among the deceased. The fire broke out during a performance, cutting off power and trapping many inside. Athipat, who sustained injuries, reflected on the tragedy during his girlfriend's funeral.
latest.full_brief: A fire at a bar in Bangkok resulted in the deaths of 33 people, including four members of the band Thotsakan. Band leader Athipat Wichan expressed his grief and regret over the loss of his girlfriend, who was among the deceased. The fire broke out during a performance, cutting off power and trapping many inside. Athipat, who sustained injuries, reflected on the tragedy during his girlfriend's funeral.

latest.title: Volunteer firefighter suspected of starting devastating France forest fire
latest.summary: A volunteer firefighter has been placed under formal investigation in France on suspicion of starting a fire in a forest south of Paris. The Fontainebleau fire has burned more than 2,000 hectares and led to about 1,000 people being evacuated.
latest.details: A volunteer firefighter has been placed under formal investigation in France on suspicion of starting a fire in a forest south of Paris. The Fontainebleau fire has burned more than 2,000 hectares and led to about 1,000 people being evacuated. President Emmanuel Macron stated that there had not been so many fires in France since World War Two. The forest is home to the Palace and Park of Fontainebleau, a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1981.
latest.full_brief: A volunteer firefighter has been placed under formal investigation in France on suspicion of starting a fire in a forest south of Paris. The Fontainebleau fire has burned more than 2,000 hectares and led to about 1,000 people being evacuated. President Emmanuel Macron stated that there had not been so many fires in France since World War Two. The forest is home to the Palace and Park of Fontainebleau, a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1981.

latest.title: Watch: What to know as Genoa bridge disaster trial ends
latest.summary: The former CEO of Italy's motorway operator has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for his role in the Genoa bridge disaster. The collapse of the Morandi bridge in August 2018 resulted in the deaths of 43 people.
latest.details: The former CEO of Italy's motorway operator has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for his role in the Genoa bridge disaster. The collapse of the Morandi bridge in August 2018 resulted in the deaths of 43 people. Another official received an 11-year sentence as part of the trial involving 32 individuals found guilty. The disaster occurred during a rainstorm at a peak holiday time, leading to significant public outcry.
latest.full_brief: The former CEO of Italy's motorway operator has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for his role in the Genoa bridge disaster. The collapse of the Morandi bridge in August 2018 resulted in the deaths of 43 people. Another official received an 11-year sentence as part of the trial involving 32 individuals found guilty. The disaster occurred during a rainstorm at a peak holiday time, leading to significant public outcry.

latest.title: Fifa 'assessing match reports' over Falklands banner
latest.summary: Fifa is currently reviewing match reports regarding Argentina's players displaying a banner supporting their claim to the Falkland Islands. The banner was shown after Argentina's World Cup semi-final victory over England.
latest.details: Fifa is currently reviewing match reports regarding Argentina's players displaying a banner supporting their claim to the Falkland Islands. The banner was shown after Argentina's World Cup semi-final victory over England. In 2014, Argentina was fined for a similar incident, which Fifa deemed a breach of political action rules. The UK government has expressed its commitment to the Falkland Islands, emphasizing their status as a British overseas territory.
latest.full_brief: Fifa is currently reviewing match reports regarding Argentina's players displaying a banner supporting their claim to the Falkland Islands. The banner was shown after Argentina's World Cup semi-final victory over England. In 2014, Argentina was fined for a similar incident, which Fifa deemed a breach of political action rules. The UK government has expressed its commitment to the Falkland Islands, emphasizing their status as a British overseas territory.

latest.title: JD Vance says Welsh castle was 'coolest thing I've ever seen'
latest.summary: JD Vance expressed his admiration for Caernarfon Castle, calling it the "coolest thing I've ever seen" during a visit in 2013. He noted the castle's historical significance, contrasting it with buildings in the US.
latest.details: JD Vance expressed his admiration for Caernarfon Castle, calling it the "coolest thing I've ever seen" during a visit in 2013. He noted the castle's historical significance, contrasting it with buildings in the US. Vance's experiences in the UK provided him with a new perspective on life and marriage. He and his wife engaged in typical vacation activities, including visiting local pubs and exploring other castles.
latest.full_brief: JD Vance expressed his admiration for Caernarfon Castle, calling it the "coolest thing I've ever seen" during a visit in 2013. He noted the castle's historical significance, contrasting it with buildings in the US. Vance's experiences in the UK provided him with a new perspective on life and marriage. He and his wife engaged in typical vacation activities, including visiting local pubs and exploring other castles.

latest.title: Fraud crackdown on Ghana ID cards makes digital checks compulsory - photocopies banned
latest.summary: All businesses and other institutions in Ghana must now use a biometric app scanner to check national identity cards under new rules aimed at strengthening security and curbing fraud. The biometric data captured on the card by the country's National Identification Authority (NIA) includes 10 fingerprints, iris scans as well as a photograph and signature.
latest.details: All businesses and other institutions in Ghana must now use a biometric app scanner to check national identity cards under new rules aimed at strengthening security and curbing fraud. The biometric data captured on the card by the country's National Identification Authority (NIA) includes 10 fingerprints, iris scans as well as a photograph and signature. It is now an offence to photocopy or visually inspect a Ghana Card for the purpose of transaction. The agency urged organisations that were not yet connected to its digital identity verification app to begin the process immediately.
latest.full_brief: All businesses and other institutions in Ghana must now use a biometric app scanner to check national identity cards under new rules aimed at strengthening security and curbing fraud. The biometric data captured on the card by the country's National Identification Authority (NIA) includes 10 fingerprints, iris scans as well as a photograph and signature. It is now an offence to photocopy or visually inspect a Ghana Card for the purpose of transaction. The agency urged organisations that were not yet connected to its digital identity verification app to begin the process immediately.

latest.title: White House teleprompter operator accused of making $100k off Trump speech bets
latest.summary: Gabriel Perez is accused of placing bets on words the president would use during major public addresses. The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has been informed of the activity by Kalshi, the prediction markets platform.
latest.details: Gabriel Perez is accused of placing bets on words the president would use during major public addresses. The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has been informed of the activity by Kalshi, the prediction markets platform. Kalshi froze Perez's account before he could withdraw any profits, which amounted to over $90,000. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt confirmed that Perez is now on unpaid leave and will no longer work at the White House.
latest.full_brief: Gabriel Perez is accused of placing bets on words the president would use during major public addresses. The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has been informed of the activity by Kalshi, the prediction markets platform. Kalshi froze Perez's account before he could withdraw any profits, which amounted to over $90,000. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt confirmed that Perez is now on unpaid leave and will no longer work at the White House.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
